all_cases.description: SET stores a value and GET retrieves it exactly.
DEL returns count of removed keys; EXISTS returns 0 after delete.
SET overwrites previous value of same key.
LPUSH prepends elements; LRANGE shows correct LIFO-style head order.
RPUSH appends elements preserving insertion order.
LPOP removes and returns first element; LLEN reflects updated size.
LRANGE with negative indices and subrange works correctly.
SADD adds members and SMEMBERS returns them as a JSON array.
SADD deduplicates; SREM removes members; SISMEMBER checks membership.
SCARD returns correct cardinality after SADD and SREM.
HSET sets a field and HGET retrieves it.
all_cases.expected:
step 0: expected stdout '1', got '(nil)'
step 1: expected stdout 'Alice', got '(nil)'
step 2: expected stdout '(nil)', got ''
all_cases.stderr: (error) wrong number of arguments for 'HSET' command

all_cases.description: HSET multi-field; HDEL removes fields; HGETALL returns all fields.
all_cases.expected:
step 0: expected stdout '3', got '{}'
step 2: expected stdout '1', got '{}'
step 4: expected stdout '(nil)', got ''
step 1: expected JSON {'name': 'Alice', 'age': '30', 'city': 'NYC'}, got 0
step 3: stdout is not JSON: '(nil)'
all_cases.stderr: (error) wrong number of arguments for 'HSET' command

all_cases.description: HEXISTS returns 1 for existing fields and 0 for missing fields.

step 3: expected stdout '0', got ''

all_cases.description: KEYS returns all keys without pattern; filters with glob pattern.
EXPIRE sets TTL; TTL reads it; TTL returns -2 for missing key and -1 for persistent key.
FLUSHDB removes all keys; DBSIZE becomes 0; KEYS returns empty.
LPOP on a string key fails non-zero and preserves the original value.
all_cases.stderr: (error) WRONGTYPE Operation against a key holding the wrong kind of value
